info.name: Whats Pro Go Api
info.description:
feel free to test whats pro go api

💥All requestes should be **encrypted** with AES, you can use Cryptojs or altranitve packages,

✅✅💥💥Encryption Key Is : `abcd123456789ABCD`💥💥✅✅

then after body encryption

if you are using javascript you can do it something like

``` javascript
//Example Encryption Code
var encrypted  = CryptoJS.AES.encrypt('{email:"",password:""}', "abcd123456789ABCD").toString();
var requestBody = {payload:encrypted};

 ```

Some Packages to help in encryption

For Javascript :

[https://www.npmjs.com/package/crypto-js](https://www.npmjs.com/package/crypto-js)

[https://github.com/abdo0/sas4-request-encrypt-or-decrypt](https://github.com/abdo0/sas4-request-encrypt-or-decrypt)

For c#:

[https://github.com/waadmawlood/snono-encrypt-payload](https://github.com/waadmawlood/snono-encrypt-payload)

For PHP:

[https://github.com/h4775346/AES-PHP](https://github.com/h4775346/AES-PHP)

request.description:
Request Body

``` json
{
    "send_phone": true,
    "phones": [
        "+201010959716"
    ],
    "send_group": false,
    "group_id": 0,
    "send_client": false,
    "client_ids": [],
    "img": null,
    "client_default_phone": true,
    "send_all_clients": false,
    "message": "this is a test message"
}

 ```

Sending message has many options,

💥Sending To A Specific Phones

if you need to send to a specific phones then just make `send_phone` to true and enter the phone numbers in phones array

💥Sending to A Specific Group

just set `send_group` attribute to true and set `group_id` then it will send to selected group id

💥Sending to A Specific clients by their id's

just set `send_client` attribute to true and add some of clients id's and it will send to selected clients phones,

`hint` : when selected client's id's there is an option to send to their primary (default) phone only by setting `client_default_phone` to true

💥Sending to All Clients

just set `send_all_clients` attribute to true and it will send to all clients default (primary phones only)

💥Example on sending image with text

``` json
{
    "send_phone": true,
    "phones": [
        "+201010959716"
    ],
    "send_group": false,
    "group_id": 0,
    "send_client": false,
    "client_ids": [],
    "img": "data:image/png;base64,",
    "client_default_phone": true,
    "send_all_clients": false,
    "message": "this is a text image"
}

 ```

item.name: Messages non-encrypted
Send Message Using Full Phone Format

request.description:
*   api_token is Provided in user Account Data
*   api_token can be used in request body or header or in url
*   all request parameters can be in body as POST or in url as a GET request
*   Phone Number Must be in format +XX XXXXXXXXXX
*   Phones parameter is an array of phones that message will be sent to

*   api_token is Provided in user Account Data
*   api_token can be used in request body or header or in url all request parameters can be in body as POST or in url as a GET request
*   Phone Number Can be at any valid phone format
*   Phones parameter is an array of phones that message will be sent to

item.name: Send Message With Image From Url
Send Message With Image From Base64
Upload document to get its id to send in message using doc_id

request.description:
to send document with the message you need to upload it first using the follwoing endpoint :

``` bash
curl -X POST "url/documents/token-upload?api_token={your_api_token}" -F "file=@/path/to/file.pdf"

 ```

then you will get id

``` json
{
  "id": "uuid-here",
  "original_name": "file.pdf",
  "mime_type": "application/pdf",
  "size": 12345
}

 ```

> you can the id to send document with any message using body parameter "doc_id"

item.description:
This Is The Only NonEncrypted End Points, it can be used in some systems that doesn't support encryptions

to send document with the message you need to upload it first using the follwoing endpoint :

``` bash
curl -X POST "url/documents/token-upload?api_token={your_api_token}" -F "file=@/path/to/file.pdf"

 ```

then you will get id

``` json
{
  "id": "uuid-here",
  "original_name": "file.pdf",
  "mime_type": "application/pdf",
  "size": 12345
}

 ```

> you can the id to send document with any message using body parameter "doc_id"
